text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After her latest race, Symboli Rudolf shows up at
my office while I'm working.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: There's something I'd like to discuss with you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I believe it's vital for Umamusume and their
trainers to respect one another.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If they are to tread the same path, they must walk
in stride.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: So, I will be frank with you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: My current racing schedule is too intense.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I can't put my best foot forward in future races if
I'm still exhausted from past ones.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The final decision is yours, but I would appreciate
it if you would take my opinion into
consideration.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf has a point. We might need to
revise our current approach.
